title: Daily Independent Journal — April 21, 1962 (Page 1)
author: Daily Independent Journal
card_summary: A clipped front page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Saturday, April 21, 1962. As a front-page clipping from 1962, this item is likely preserved as a record of local news relevant to Philip K. Dick's life and surroundings during his period of residence in the San Rafael area.
page_summary:
A scanned front page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Saturday, April 21, 1962. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 5, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

As a front-page clipping from 1962, this item is particularly notable within the archive. The year 1962 was pivotal for Dick: The Man in the High Castle was published that year and would go on to win the Hugo Award for Best Novel, Dick's only major award during his lifetime. Front-page news from Dick's local community during this watershed year in his career may provide valuable contextual documentation.
